text: Calling it now, Agent operations is going to be one of the biggest role of H2 26 & 2027!

I've gotten hundreds of DMs about the Ghostbuster role. And honestly? The quality has been incredible. Smart people, strong backgrounds, great energy.

But most of them miss the point!

This role isn't about credentials. It's about bias to action - I need to see what you've built.

So here's the ask: send me your best agent or AI project. Something you shipped. Something that works. A demo, a repo, a product - I don't care how polished it is. I care that you made it and I care about it's impact.

Talk is cheap. Builders stand out!
